title: gossypianthus mollis
intro: Gossypianthus mollis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is also known as the soft cotton bush due to its soft, cotton-like fibers that cover its seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gossypianthus mollis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing, and it is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for herbal remedies.
